question_text: A car of mass 1000 kg is being lifted vertically off the ground by a crane. Calculate the weight of the car. (Use g = 10 N/kg)
explanation: Weight is calculated using W = mg, where m is the mass in kg and g is gravitational field strength. W = 1000 × 10 = 10 000 N. This is the non-contact gravitational force acting downwards on the car.
